source_pr.title: *: refactor `context.Context`
source_pr.body:
Make transaction life cycle under control, prepare for correctly handle schema out of date error.
The old `GetTxn(forceNew boll)` is replaced by `Txn` and `NewTxn`,
`CommitTxn` and `RollbackTxn` is removed.

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: *: refactor `context.Context`.

evidence: files: context/context.go, ddl/column_change_test.go, ddl/column_test.go, ddl/ddl.go, ddl/ddl_db_test.go, ddl/ddl_test.go, ddl/foreign_key_test.go, ddl/index_change_test.go, ddl/index_test.go, ddl/reorg_test.go, ddl/schema_test.go, ddl/stat_test.go, ddl/table_test.go, domain/domain_test.go, executor/adapter.go, executor/builder.go, executor/executor.go, executor/executor_ddl.go, executor/executor_set_test.go, executor/executor_simple.go, executor/executor_simple_test.go, executor/executor_test.go, executor/executor_write.go, inspectkv/inspectkv_test.go, plan/physical_plan_builder.go, server/conn.go, session.go, session_test.go, table/tables/tables.go, table/tables/tables_test.go, tidb.go, util/mock/context.go, util/mock/mock_test.go
